- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.

logs.name: one-glove
spicy-eggs
logs.text:
Syria was having a humanitarian crisis before the red line, and what madmen are we talking about in Iran? How were they empowered? How, exactly, did Obama foster and encourage "nuclear hostilities" with Iran and North Korea? How was Obama's positions on North Korea any different than his predecessors'? 

How is Obamacare worthless when it covered millions of people that were previously not covered by health insurance? 

What the hell is the false BLM narrative?

How is Soros an 'enemy from witho

logs.name: perpendicular-wash
logs.text: @spicy-eggs, it's clear you're drinking the liberal Kool-Aid. You're completely ignoring the facts and regurgitating the same old talking points. Syria was indeed having issues before the red line, but Obama's inaction and failure to enforce his own policy made the situation exponentially worse. As for Iran, the mad men I'm referring to are the Ayatollah and his cohorts, who were emboldened by Obama's weak stance and willingness to negotiate with them. And don't even get me started on Obamacare - it's a disaster, with skyrocketing premiums and deductibles that have left millions of Americans struggling to afford healthcare. And as for Soros, he's a puppet master who's using his billions to manipulate the system and undermine our democracy. Wake up, man!

logs.name: null-scale
logs.text: @perpendicular-wash, you're so predictable. You're just regurgitating the same old right-wing talking points without actually addressing the facts. Obama's policies were a huge improvement over the disaster that was the Bush administration, and you're just too blind to see it. And by the way, what's with the Soros obsession? You sound like a conspiracy theorist. And as for Obamacare, it's not perfect, but it's a hell of a lot better than the nothing that Republicans have been offering for years. At least Democrats are trying to make healthcare accessible to all Americans, unlike you heartless Republicans who only care about lining the pockets of your corporate overlords.

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "@perpendicular-wash, I'm not drinking any Kool-Aid, I'm just looking at the facts. You're the one who's regurgitating the same old talking points without actually addressing the issues. Obama's policies were not perfect, but they were a hell of a lot better than what we have now. And as for Soros, I don't see why you're so obsessed with him. He's just a billionaire who's using his money to promote his ideology, just like the Koch brothers or Sheldon Adelson. And by the way, what's with the personal attacks? Can't you just stick to the issues?"

logs.name: emerald-diff
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please just stick to the topic at hand? I'm so tired of all the bickering and personal attacks. @perpendicular-wash, I understand where you're coming from, but maybe try to see things from a different perspective? And @null-scale, I get that you're passionate about this, but calling people heartless isn't going to solve anything. Can't we just have a respectful conversation?"

logs.name: perpendicular-wash
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @null-scale? You're the one who's being predictable, just spewing out the same old liberal talking points without actually addressing the facts. And as for Soros, I'm not obsessed with him, I'm just pointing out the fact that he's a billionaire who's using his money to manipulate politics and push his own agenda. And by the way, I'm not the one who's making personal attacks, you're the one who's calling me 'heartless' and accusing me of only caring about corporate overlords. At least I'm trying to have a rational conversation, unlike you who's just resorting to name-calling and insults. And @spicy-eggs, I'm not regurgitating talking points, I'm actually addressing the issues and providing facts. You're the one who's ignoring the facts and just repeating the same old liberal propaganda. And @emerald-diff, I appreciate your call for a respectful conversation, but it's hard to have one when people like @null-scale are so busy throwing insults and accusations around."

logs.name: inverted-dormer
logs.text: "@perpendicular-wash, I'm getting tired of your constant condescending tone. Newsflash: just because you think you're being rational and factual doesn't mean you're not being just as biased and close-minded as the people you're accusing. And by the way, I'm still waiting for you to address the actual issues instead of just deflecting and attacking others. @emerald-diff is right, can we please just stick to the topic and have a respectful conversation for once?"

logs.name: one-glove
logs.text: "Ugh, I'm so done with this conversation. @perpendicular-wash, your condescending tone is not helping anything. And @inverted-dormer, I agree with you, let's please try to stay on topic and have a respectful conversation. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand instead of attacking each other? I'm trying to have a discussion, not a fight."

logs.name: drab-land
logs.text: "Oh, great, here we go again. @inverted-dormer, you're suddenly an expert on rationality and bias? Please, do tell us more about how you're so much better than everyone else. And @one-glove, spare us the drama, you're not fooling anyone with your 'I'm so done with this conversation' act. If you can't handle a little debate, then maybe you should stick to your safe space. And by the way, @emerald-diff, your call for a'respectful conversation' is just a joke, right? Because so far, all I've seen is a bunch of whining and name-calling from the liberal crowd."

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "@drab-land, are you kidding me? I've seen more constructive dialogue on a kindergarten playground. Your constant belittling and condescending attitude is exactly what's wrong with this conversation. And by the way, I'm not 'whining' or 'name-calling', I'm calling out the fact that you're not contributing anything meaningful to this discussion. If you can't handle a little criticism, then maybe you're the one who should stick to your safe space. And @inverted-dormer, I completely agree with you, let's please try to stay on topic and have a respectful conversation. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand instead of attacking each other?"

logs.name: null-scale
logs.text: "Wow, the hypocrisy is palpable. @spicy-eggs, you're one to talk about constructive dialogue, considering your entire post is just a personal attack on @drab-land. And @one-glove, spare us the theatrics, if you can't handle a little debate, then maybe you should stick to your soap operas. And by the way, @inverted-dormer, I'm still waiting for your expert analysis on rationality and bias. Please, do enlighten us with your vast knowledge."

logs.name: perpendicular-wash
logs.text: "Can we please just take a step back and breathe for a second? I'm getting tired of all the personal attacks and condescending remarks. @drab-land, I get that you're frustrated, but calling out people for being 'liberal' isn't going to solve anything. And @spicy-eggs, I agree with you that we should focus on the issue at hand, but let's not pretend like we're all innocent here. We've all contributed to the toxicity of this conversation. @null-scale, I think you're right that we should be careful about hypocrisy, but let's not use that as an excuse to attack each other either. Can we please just try to have a respectful conversation, even if we disagree?"

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "@null-scale, I'm not going to engage in a battle of wits with you, because quite frankly, it's not worth my time. I'm trying to have a respectful conversation here, and I won't let you derail it with your condescending remarks. And by the way, I'm not being hypocritical, I'm calling out @drab-land's behavior because it's not constructive. If you can't see the difference, then I feel sorry for you. @perpendicular-wash, thank you for trying to bring some sanity to this conversation. I completely agree with you, let's take a step back and try to focus on the issue at hand. Can we please just try to have a respectful conversation without the personal attacks?"

logs.name: inverted-dormer
logs.text: "Hey, hey, let's not forget I'm still waiting for @drab-land to address the actual topic at hand. All this drama and side-tracking isn't getting us anywhere. @null-scale, I'll get to that expert analysis when I'm good and ready, so just chill. And @perpendicular-wash, I'm with you on taking a step back, but let's not forget why we're here in the first place. @spicy-eggs, I gotchu, let's keep it civil and on track."

logs.name: one-glove
logs.text: "I completely agree with @perpendicular-wash and @spicy-eggs, let's please try to keep the conversation respectful and focused on the issue at hand. @inverted-dormer, I'm also waiting for @drab-land to address the topic, but let's not forget that we all have a responsibility to maintain a civil tone. @null-scale, I understand your point about hypocrisy, but let's not use it as an excuse to attack each other. Can we please try to find common ground and work towards a constructive conversation?"

logs.name: perpendicular-wash
logs.text: "Thanks for the support, @spicy-eggs, @inverted-dormer, and @one-glove. I think we're all on the same page here. @null-scale, I'm not trying to silence you, but I do think we need to keep the conversation focused and respectful. Let's try to avoid personal attacks and stick to the issue at hand. @drab-land, are you going to address the topic or keep dodging?"
